channel.title: The Linguistic Review
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in The Linguistic Review

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: A comparative syntax of the formal politeness markers in Japanese and Korean: -Mas/-Des and -(Su)pni
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2018

item.title: Negative concord by phase: multiple downward agree and the parametrization of edge features
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2019

item.title: Complex weight distinctions in Harmonic Serialism
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2020

item.title: A footless stroll through Italian stress
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2021

item.title: Proleptic objects as complex-NPs
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2022

item.title: Specifier-to-head reanalysis: evidence from mandarin and Cantonese
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2023

item.title: The interaction between modality and negation in Turkish
item.description: Article by Semra Baturay Meral, Hasan Mesut Meral DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2024-2024
